final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Instagram story photo with hand-drawn annotations
Primary request: Korean cafe aesthetic coffee and dessert flat-lay with white hand-drawn sketch lines, arrows, dotted lines, Japanese handwritten annotations, and decorative doodles
Scene/backdrop: minimalist marble or light wood cafe table, soft natural window light, Korean cafe interior blur
Subject: iced latte in clear glass with visible layers, croissant or macaron on ceramic plate, small vase with dried flowers, clean composition without people
Style/medium: smartphone photography aesthetic, hand-drawn illustration overlay, sketch-like white line art, magazine rough-note style
Composition/framing: top-down flat-lay, smartphone camera perspective, generous negative space for annotations
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural daylight, bright and airy, cozy and relaxed atmosphere
Color palette: warm beige, soft cream, muted pastels, white sketch lines on slightly desaturated photo
Materials/textures: glossy ceramic, flaky pastry, glass condensation, marble grain, paper-like sketch texture
Text (verbatim): 「さわやか」「しっとり」「リラックス」「しあわせすぎ～」「やさしいあまみ」「さいこう」「すてきなじかん」
Constraints: no people in frame, hand-drawn lines must look like white pen sketch, annotations in Japanese (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji), maintain Instagram story proportions with blank space
Avoid: photorealistic human hands, overly perfect digital lines, cluttered composition, watermark, 8K, ultra-detailed, masterpiece
